message:
style(vdbe): rustfmt reflow of b.emit_op String8 calls in collation-aware test fixtures

Pure rustfmt reflow of two multi-argument b.emit_op(Opcode::String8,
...) calls in the collation-aware VDBE test harness.  The calls
were written inline on single lines but exceeded rustfmt's
default printWidth, so `cargo fmt --check` was flagging them.

crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs

- Two test fixtures (one using "alpha" and one using "ALPHA" as
  the text payload for the NOCASE collation-aware SeekGT probe)
  now wrap the Opcode::String8 emit_op calls across multiple
  lines, one argument per line, matching the formatting rustfmt
  produces for the other multi-arg emit_op calls elsewhere in
  the same module.

No functional change — the test opcodes, their operands, and
the assertions that follow are untouched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
